# ADR-2026-04-01-0099: Duplicate ID — first file

**Status:** Accepted
**Date:** 2026-04-17
**Drivers:** First of two files sharing the same `ADR-2026-04-01-0099` prefix. The DuplicateId detector groups by filename ID and flags both.

## Context

Reproduces the production incident referenced in ADR-2026-04-27-0800 where two timestamp-collision ADRs landed on disk simultaneously.
